title: helichrysum cymosum subsp. fruticosum
intro: Helichrysum cymosum subsp. fruticosum, also known as the small yellow hill daisy or mountain helichrysum, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties, making it useful for treating a variety of health issues. The health benefits of Helichrysum cymosum subsp. fruticosum include reducing inflammation and pain, improving wound healing, and supporting respiratory health. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to promote relaxation, reduce stress, and improve overall well-being.
